title: CRISIL Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Junior)

jsonLd.title: CRISIL Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Credit Analyst with drive and ambition, CRISIL Consulting Pvt Ltd in Faridabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About CRISIL Consulting Pvt Ltd:
CRISIL Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CRISIL Consulting Pvt Ltd!
